permuted_mnist_like.heldout_deployment_objective: post-run selected weights; no task id
permuted_mnist_like.limitations: True OpenML MNIST. This is a full source split only when is_full_mnist_split=true; the online protocol still depends on task_block_size, task_sampling, and n_permutations.
permuted_mnist_like.published_protocol_delta: Dohare et al. used true MNIST, randomized pixel permutations, 60,000 examples per task, 800 tasks in the main OPMNIST protocol, a single pass through each task in random order, no mini-batches, and no task-switch indication. This runner is only a published-scale OPMNIST run when matches_dohare_opmnist_core_protocol and matches_dohare_opmnist_published_task_count are both true.

dataset.heldout_deployment_objective: post-run selected weights; no task id
dataset.limitations: True OpenML MNIST. This is a full source split only when is_full_mnist_split=true; the online protocol still depends on task_block_size, task_sampling, and n_permutations.
dataset.published_protocol_delta: Dohare et al. used true MNIST, randomized pixel permutations, 60,000 examples per task, 800 tasks in the main OPMNIST protocol, a single pass through each task in random order, no mini-batches, and no task-switch indication. This runner is only a published-scale OPMNIST run when matches_dohare_opmnist_core_protocol and matches_dohare_opmnist_published_task_count are both true.
